meaning: adj.口出粗俗的,出言不逊的
examples: He looked around to see a gaggle of first years running back around the corner, apparently under the impression that they had just encountered a particularly foulmouthed ghost.
As Dracos describes her, O'Hair was a unique combination of brilliant manipulator and outrageous, foulmouthed trouble-seeker.
Tom Cruise almost unrecognizable as a foulmouthed, foul-mannered movie executive?
